visualizerParams.title: Large Non-Mersenne Prime
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Fix the logic to correctly calculate the last ten digits of a large prime number without memory errors.
visualizerParams.buggyCode:
def solution():
    # BUG: Calculating 2**7830457 directly will create a massive number
    # and might cause an OverflowError or consume huge amounts of memory/time
    large_prime = 28433 * (2 ** 7830457) + 1
    
    # BUG: Converting a million-digit number to string just to slice it is slow
    return str(large_prime)[-10:]


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(solution())
